title: UvaXtreme v2.0 - 2nd Runners Up
description: I’m pleased to share that our team, Crud Ops, secured 2nd Runners-Up (First-Year Category) at the UvaXtreme v2.0 Programming Competition 2025, organized by the IEEE Computer Society Student Branch of Uva Wellassa University. This achievement reflects our teamwork, problem-solving, and dedication throughout the competition. Grateful to my teammates for their support—looking forward to more challenges and growth. 🚀

title: HackMs'25 - Best Performance
description: I’m thrilled to share that our project AMITY has been officially certified by the Ms Club of Uva Wellassa University 🏆 We built Amity as a centralized Opportunity Hub using Spring Boot and React to help students discover and track events in real-time, solving the issue of scattered information Grateful to my teammates for their teamwork and to the Ms Club for the recognition Special thanks to Random Software Ltd for their support Excited to keep building and innovating 🚀
